name: stitch
description: STDIO MCP server bridge for Google Stitch design platform - connect any AI agent to the full Stitch MCP toolset.

interface.shortDescription: Bridge AI agents to Google Stitch design platform via MCP.
interface.longDescription: Stitch-MCP is an open-source STDIO bridge that connects AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, etc.) to the Google Stitch design platform. It exposes 14 native Stitch MCP tools plus 5 virtual SDK tools - project management, screen generation, design systems, asset upload/download, and more - all through a single `npx @natroc/stitch-mcp` command.
defaultPrompt: Use Stitch-MCP to generate app screens from text descriptions and manage design systems.
Connect to Google Stitch to create projects, generate variants, and upload design files.
Set up the Stitch-MCP bridge to design and prototype with AI-assisted workflows.
